{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230057063EE389ACB12DF22CDDA4"}"},"total":134},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7206497258320413443","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本小说，开头一上来全副武装一个最低级士兵就要38金币！金银铜按照1比1000换算！按以前我国发行过铜镍合金铜币。6克多！就算按5克，也就是一个金币可以换500万克=一万斤=五吨铜币[奸笑]现在同价是7000一吨，五吨35万。金价540！那么一个金币650克左右[盯]38个金币重49.4斤！可以换190吨铜币。武装一个人最低13338万。这还是工业挖掘才这么便宜。书中的中世纪估计更值钱！因为我都是听书，所以对话都是甲说。。。乙说。。。丙说。。。。","text_exts":[{"e":193,"s":190,"text":"中世纪","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E4%B8%96%E7%BA%AA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774198626F22CDDA4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227206497258320413443%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227085553704987790375%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E4%B8%96%E7%BA%AA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1677893526,"group_id":"7085553704987790375","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+3qdnsx7idfiYnvOzaKx3H2V2S9JJB5gj+rtoAel7BT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c3515ac0a91c4b748acf7488d9df63c7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793720&x-signature=7NqZj8fY8cNpUjbIYtKHnBFSccU%3D","user_id":"2498550499647006","user_name":"萌萌的汉子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2498550499647006","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775613519,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7085553704987790375","book_info":{"abstract":"一个落入异界魔法世界的灵魂，一个机缘巧合形成的神器，一个合理又不合理的男爵家族。
李枫即现在的威廉，发现自己继任领主竟然还需要完成试炼，但问题是一个男爵领为什么会这么大！
实力一步一步增长，谜团却是一个又一个的增加。当威廉一步一步的走上世界的巅峰时，蓦然回首，发现自己不过又站在一个新的起点。
当异界当虫族入侵之时，人类外有魔兽大规模入侵，内有虫族突破封印需要镇压。在这内忧外患的危机时刻，威廉横空出世，镇压魔兽，驱逐虫族，最后在万众瞩目的情况下加冕成帝。
本书又名《转生异界成男爵之子》
